entry.title: Re: SAP Human Capital Management for SAP S/4HANA now available as part of the SAP S/4HANA 2022 relea
entry.content:
@Ralf2,

thank you for this blog. Coming a bit late into the discussion. We are using S4/Hana Cloud solution and using infotype 0315 Timesheet defaults to support S4/Hana CATS timesheet on the same system. Are there plans to decommission IT0315 as data source for default timesheet values? Thank you very much.

Kind Regards,

Petra

entry.title: Re: Integrate SAP Cloud ALM with JIRA
entry.content:
Hello Lukas,

Unfortunately, there is no such step by step documentation available up to my knowledge. You need to check the documentation of the products involved in this integration scenario (SAP Cloud ALM, SAP Integration Suite, Jira). 

If you are interested in the integration between SAP Cloud ALM and Jira, I can recommend the reading of the following blogs which propose another approached maybe simpler to setup since the Open Connector is not involved but only SAP Cloud ALM and Jira: 

  • https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-alm-api-integration-tasks-defects-requirements-to-jira/ba-p/13580451
  • https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/produce-a-jira-project-task-out-of-a-sap-cloud-alm-event-situation/ba-p/13567809

A default mapping to Jira platform is now delivered in standard with SAP Cloud ALM.

Best Regards,

Cy.Mac.

entry.title: SAP Community Meetup Oslo
entry.content:
SAP Tech Enthusiasts in Oslo – Let’s Do It Again!

We had a nice time at our last SAP after-work event that we're doing it again! 🚀

If you missed out on the first one, here’s your chance to join us for another evening of networking, mingling, and tech talk. Whether you're a coding guru, SAP expert, or just curious about what SAP has to offer, this event is the perfect opportunity to connect with like-minded professionals in a fun and casual atmosphere.

Event Details:

🗓Date: 06/09/2024
🕔Time: 17:00
📍Location: To be announced soon! Stay tuned for updates on the venue.

Our last event was a hit, with engaging conversations, shared insights, and new connections being made. This time, we’re expecting an even bigger turnout, so make sure you’re part of it!

What to Expect:

  • Networking Opportunities: Connect with fellow SAP professionals, tech enthusiasts, and industry experts.
  • Casual Atmosphere: No formalities here, just good vibes, great people, and a shared passion for SAP.
  • Tech Talk: Dive into discussions about the latest SAP trends, challenges, and solutions.
  • New Connections: Expand your professional network in Oslo’s growing SAP community.

Bring your ideas, questions, and business cards, this could be your chance to explore new opportunities, collaborate on exciting projects, or simply learn something new.

RSVP Now!

Space is limited, so make sure to reserve your spot early 📩 

Looking forward to seeing you there!

entry.title: Re: Copying calculated measure to measure
entry.content: When using a cross model copy step to copy calculated measure to an other measure in 2nd model, then calculated value is not copied correctly. Say my calculated measure is amount = rate * qty. I copy amount to amount_copy in cross model copy step. Then its showing wrong data in amount_copy field

You can use migration cockpit to load the PM master data. You can refer this video to get some idea on use of migration cockpit.

entry.title: Re: Settlement Error - AUC (Investment) to Asset
entry.content: Can you make sure you are using the Run Settlement Actual app to do settlement https://fioriappslibrary.hana.ondemand.com/sap/fix/externalViewer/#/detail/Apps('F4568')/S32

entry.title: Re: How to upload legacy assets in AUC assets in SAP?
entry.content: Try ABNAN with tty 158, make sure the deactivation date is blank.

entry.title: Re: table to get data available capacity per periode tcod...
entry.content:
Please refer this thread. => Capacity tables

Vaibhav Mishra

entry.title: Re: Change Posting Date (AFAB) - FAA_DEPRECIATION_POST
entry.content: Depreciation is based off 12 periods using most depreciation keys, if you are using a standard fiscal year variant like K4 then there is no way to change it. You would need to think about implementing your own fiscal year variant with different end dates than standard.

entry.title: Re: Adding a custom Picklist to a specific Time Type (Leave Request)
entry.content: Excellent

entry.title: Re: Inquiry Regarding Depreciation Settings and Disposal...
entry.content: Have you parallel currencies that are zero? Maybe check the other currencies to see if they were maintained before the manual posting.

entry.title: Re: Copy over delivery/ under delivery tolerance values from SO to Prod ord
entry.content: Hi, his is an old thread but actually matching my issue. What is the right way to transfer the Tolerance to the requirememnts, our sales order have a -0/+10% tolerance and in 30% of the cases we fail because the requirements are triggered only for the nominal qty and the component scrap. I would love to sell always more than nominal and not bother custmer with shorts. There must be a solution for it.

entry.title: Problem Flexible Billing Document Numbering not provided for Country/Region PT. SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hello everybody,


When doing an invoicing for a Portuguese company using the VF04 or VF01 we are getting an error when doing the invoicing document.

 

We have created the flexible numbering in the billing document, which we have configured as follows (we had to do this step for the ATCUD implementation):

First we have created the FT numbering prefix (SSCIU 103283):

Once the numbering prefix has been created, we have created the Z3 number range within the FT prefix (SSCIU 102819):

 

Once the number range has been created, we have created the formula for flexible numbering (SSCIU 103306):

 

 

 

 

When creating the formula, we have created the routine and assigned the formula created in the previous step (SSCIU 103058):

 

The next step we have done is to assign the routine to the F2 invoice type (SSCIU 103062):

 

Once the routine has been assigned, we have gone to the "Record Number Ranges for Digital Signature of Billing Documents (SD)" configuration point and created the Z3 number range (SSCIU 180009):

 

When creating the number range Z3 and the series, we have assigned in the configuration item "Assign SAF-T Document Types to Number Ranges (SD)" the number range with the invoice type of SAFT-T Portugal (SSCIU 105873)::

 

In the "Manage Series Validation Code" application we enter the "Validation code" provided by the customer:

 

 

When generating the invoice document using the VF04, we get this error:

 

Please, can you help us to solve the problem?

Thank you very much in advance, best regards

entry.title: Unlock the expertise of top SAP professionals through live sessions - Register now!
entry.content:
Unlock the expertise of top SAP professionals through live sessions.
Elevate your knowledge with specialized SAP courses and build valuable connections with peers and industry professionals.
Don't miss the opportunity and join our live sessions

SAP Business Technology Platform

  • Getting Started With Development Using SAP BTP ABAP Environment
    (Europe time-friendly): August 30, 6:00 p.m.–  7:00 p.m. (CET)
  • Extension & Customization of SAP PM through SAP BTP: Taking Asset Maintenance one step further
    Europe time-friendly): September 5, 10:00 a.m.– 12:00 p.m. (CET)

SAP ABAP Cloud

  • Getting Started With ABAP Cloud Development
    (America time-friendly): August 23, 12:00 p.m.– 1:00 a.m. (EST)
  • Stay certified - Back-End Developer - ABAP Cloud
    (Recording)     

SAP S/4HANA

  • Business Partner Master Data in SAP S/4HANA from the Purchasing Perspective
    (Asian-Pacific-Japan time-friendly): August 13, 11:00 p.m.–1:00 a.m. (SGT)
  • Financial Document Clearing in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
    (Asian-Pacific-Japan time-friendly): August 28, 4:00 p.m.–6:00 p.m. (SGT

New Live Session for Data Integration for Incentive Management

As an SAP Learning Hub subscriber, you can join this live session to explore the various methods of data integration, with a focus on the best options for different scenarios. You will learn how to implement various data integration environments, ranging from a simple file import to an enterprise level data load. If you are involved in an incentive management implementation of any size, you don’t want to miss this session. 
Read more

 

Please note
You can find the latest live sessions here to engage and learn with SAP experts and peers.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: CAP CDS Connect on-demand to Hana with connection data from CF Connection broker
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I am developing a nodejs service with typescript, which will retrieve given resources from a tenant DB. This means that my service is not bound to any hana instance and I do not have the credentials for these DBs at compile time. For the purpose of retrieving credentials(connection data), the service is leveraging the Node Service Template which provides a sdk for Connection Broker. Connection Broker enables services to connect to a backing HANA instance. It's primary purpose is to provide a usable SQL connection string that enable services to create the connection. Basically connection broker creates a temporary user when demanded and returns DB credentials for a specific tenant DB. My service will serve hundreds of tenants, which means I have to establish a new connection to the DB and pass it to CDS for each request. I do not have access to the credentials, only an established Connection object (from @Sap/hana-client) is returned to me through the node service template SDK.

So far, I have made it work by using @Sap/cds/libx/_runtime/hana/Service implementation from @Sap/cds-hana and have overridden the acquire and release methods. Also I have installed the dependency @Sap/hana-client, which I believe overrides the default driver:

cds.requires.db = {
  kind: 'hana',
  impl: "@sap/cds-hana"
};
const db = await cds.connect.to('db');
db.acquire = acquire;
db.release = release;

The acquire method retrieves a Connection object (from @Sap/hana-client) from the pool and returns it, and the release method hands the connection back to the pool. This works fine as the implementation from @Sap/cds-hana does not require for credentials to be present on `const db = await cds.connect.to('db')`;

However, some of the oData requests are failing (for me this limitation comes from @Sap/cds-hana impl).
E.g.:

  • filtering on expanded properties is not working
    GET myHost/api/v1/BaseResource?$expand=someNavProperty&$filter=someNavProperty/navPropertyID eq '1' 

    Error: invalid column name: ALIAS_1.someNavProperty.navPropertyID

    Basically it does not use the filter on the JOINed someNavProperty, but it searches for someNavProperty in BaseResource. The expand itself works OK.

  • "in" operator not working in filters

    GET myHost/api/v1/BaseResource?$filter=resourceID in ('1', '2')

    UriQueryOptionSemanticError: The type 'Edm.String' is not compatible to 'Edm.Boolean'

    resourceID is a String.

---------------------------------------------------------------------------
I tried using @cap-js/hana implementation instead of @Sap/cds-hana, however it requires credentials to be present on cds.connect.to('db') and I cannot provide that. 

My questions here would be:

  • For the design of my service, what service implementation should I be really using?
  • Are the 2 failing oData requests a limitation of @Sap/cds-hana?
  • Does @cap-js/hana support these failing requests?
  • If indeed @cap-js/hana implementation is the one to use, how can i connect through it, when I only have a @Sap/hana-client Connection object and it is retrieved runtime?

Thanks,
Petar

entry.title: Re: CDS for Bill of material item and dependency.
entry.content:
Hi @manish_sati1 

 

For  BOM Components we have the CDS view I_BILLOFMATERIALITEMBASIC which contains the 

field DependencyObjectNumber but unfortunately the CDS view for Object Dependency 

I_ObjectDependency is not released

 

Best Regards

Enda

entry.title: Re: Physical Inventory Document Shows Book Quantity of 0 When There is Stock in Unrestricted
entry.content: Yes, we have this issue ongoing. No solution yet.

entry.title: Autogenerated qRFC interface for BW Delta extraction
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I have a question regarding the S4-BW extractions that use delta init

For example, for 0FI_ACDOCA_10/20 we've noticed that it generates an RFC /BI0/QI0FI_ACDOCA_100001 described as "qRFC Interface for DataSource 0FI_ACDOCA_10", having an empty source code, and a table as parameter with the extraction's structure

We've been performing a trace on the extraction to measure performance and the empty function module's call is taking most of the gross % time

Probably this is expected, but I wanted to ask what is this RFC about and if there's any workaround to improve the performance on it?

Thanks

entry.title: Dump SAP GRC PC reports into custom tables
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I have a requirement to run several GRC PC reports on a frequent basis (e.g. daily, weekly, etc). I would like to schedule those reports to run in background and dump the results into custom tables.

By checking the ABAP program that runs the reports in background (GRFN_REPORT_BTC_EXECUTE), I have noted that the report is saved on the table GRFNBATCHRESULT. However, the results are saved as RAWSTRING.

Firstly, I am wondering how to schedule the reports. Secondly, I would like to know how to convert from RAWSTRING to char/text and dump into a table.

I am using SAP GRC PC v12 SP22 and the reports being used are Issue Status, Remediation Status, Control Testing History with Ratings, Ad Hoc Issues report, Control Self Assessment Details.

Anything to guide me is appreciated 🙂

entry.title: Re: Sales tax to be applied as per ship to country
entry.content:
Hi,

Thank you for reply, I have changed setting to C and entered Tax Departure country CA and Tax destination CA at Sales order header.

Maintained condition record for UTXJ as for combination of Departure country/Destination county/Tax classification customer/Tax classification Material/rate/Tax code

got below error at the time of Invoice creation.

Tax code SH in procedure TAXUSJ is invalid,

Does it mean, Canada tax codes to be added in US procedure to achieve this.

Anand

entry.title: Re: Two main items (A+B) with one free item(C) how can we...
entry.content: Free goods is only 1:1 relationship. It is not possible to achieve free goods on a combination of 2 or more products.

entry.title: Re: Compensation Statement integration with DocuSign
entry.content:
Hi @aformisano 

There is no integration at this time between DocuSign and Compensation Module admin generated Statements however I believe there is one between Document Generator (for self-service statements) in EC and DocuSign, I need to look into it and confirm. Only drawback is that Document Generator cannot pull data directly from Compensation worksheets, the data would need to be published back to EC or to an MDF object first (probably MDF here is better since we wouldn't want to publish back something that is at risk of being rejected) before the employee generates the document.

There is a way to meet the requirement of having employees approve the increase submitted to them which is documented here:

https://community.sap.com/t5/human-capital-management-blogs-by-members/non-manager-subordinate-as-active-participant-in-successfactors/ba-p/13500130

 

All the best,

Xavier

entry.title: Re: SAP CAP Node JS - how to extract filter parameters?
entry.content:
Hi @MinhTriLe,
You can fetch the filter results from filterValue = req.query.SELECT.where || {}; and use JSON.stringify(filterValue) to get those in readable format we will get the filterValue in ref and values format like below:

[{"ref":["companyCode"]},"=",{"val":"123456"}]
If we use the below code the desired output will be achieved:
function extractFilters(filters) {
    let result = {};
    for (let i = 0; i < filters.length; i++) {
        if (filters[i].ref) {
            // Extract the reference
            let ref = filters[i].ref[0];
            // Check if the next element is '=' and the element after that has a value
            if (filters[i + 1] === "=" && filters[i + 2] && filters[i + 2].val) {
                // Store the reference and its value
                result[ref] = filters[i + 2].val;
                // Skip the next two elements
                i += 2;
            }
        }
    }
    return result;
}

// Extracting the filters and their values
let filterValues = extractFilters(filters1);
console.log("Extracted filter values:", filterValues);
 
You'll get the output as Extracted filter values: { companyCode: '123456' }, now you can use the value for the business logic.

entry.title: Talent profile information (specifically career track) can be reported on in report stories?
entry.content:

I am unable to find anything in the community related to career path reporting, but hoping to gain insight on what steps to take to be able to report on career track in Report Stories. 

Thank you in adavace for any help/input. 

Sincerely, 

Stephanie

Olga.

entry.title: Re: Flexible Workflow with acocunt assignment category P...
entry.content:
Hello, 

check the numbers you assigned in OPS6. This number in OPS6 must be the same as the personel number from HR mini master. You can check the personel number from table I_PROCMTEMPLOYEEUSERDETAILS and entering User ID.

That should fix the problem.

regards

entry.title: Re: Tax juridication US
entry.content: If you are using SAP directly to calculate your tax jurisdictions, yes, You will have to manually adding all the jurisdictions needed (for each state and combination of County, district, parish, etc). That is why most of the companies use a 3rd party software which already provide all these possibilities. These software are usually Taxware or Vertex. I have used both. These provide all the jurisdictions and maintain all the rates when these changes. Again if you do not go the 3rd party route you will have to first create all the jurisdictions but going forward also maintained them. Also keep in mind that the jurisdiction follow the United Postal Service routes, SO when the USPS change their route zip codes also the tax jurisdiction will change and the address in your Customer, Vendor, Cost Center, Plants, Company Codes (all relevant for Indirect tax calculation) will have to be adjusted. So think about all this before take a decision. Maybe for a small company which has same designated locations the self maintenance will work BUT for big companies which their sales can happen all over the United States, the maintenance and keep up can become a difficult tax which might require a team in itself to keep up

BR

I quickly tested in my environment. it works.

for your error, what node js version you are using? i am using node js v20

 

onAfterRendering: function () {

var page = this.getView().byId("cus.sd.salesorderv2.manage::SalesOrderManageObjectPage--fe::ObjectPage");

var mybtn = new sap.m.Button(this.getView().createId("mybtn"), { text: "mybtn" });
var headerTitle = page.getAggregation("headerTitle");
headerTitle.addAction(mybtn);

},

entry.title: Re: Preview/Download Fragmented Forms From Fiori List Report (Part -1 )
entry.content:
Thanks a lot @abhishekdfor such an insightful BLOG.

I have some doubts.
1.The Button on the List Report header is disabled
2.The Button on the Object Page Header is not Visible
3.How do we provide the icon in the button?

On some exploration, I have found that in the manifest.json under sap.ui5 → extends → extensions in the actions along with ID, text etc we have to provide the "applicablePath": <path>
Not Sure on what exactly has to be passed( true/false is not working - Incorrect value results in OData call failure ).
Error: "Resource not found for the segment 'true'."

 

 

Could you guide me on Enabling / making the button visible, this would be of great help!
Thanks in Advance!
Snippet:

 

 

 

 

 "sap.ui.controllerExtensions": {
            "sap.suite.ui.generic.template.ListReport.view.ListReport": {
                "controllerName": "my_app.ext.controller.ListReportExtension",
                    "sap.ui.generic.app": {
                    "<entity set>": {
                        "EntitySet": "<entity set>",
                            "Actions": {
                                "<Action 1>": {
                                    "id": "<id>",
                                    "text": "<button text>",
                                    "press": "<handler function>",
                                    "requiresSelection": <true| false >,
                                    "applicablePath": <path>,
                                    "command": "<CustomActionCommandName>"
                                 },
                                "<Action 2>": {
                                    ...
                                },
                            ...
                        }
                        ...
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }

entry.content:
I have three issue with LTRMS monitor

1) Transfer order pick confirmed but transfer confirm is not happening and TO is not appearing in LTRMS monitor

2)  task stuck in the TRM Monitor (LTRMS transaction) employee did the task halfway and they can't can't unlink the task from the operator's resource

entry.title: Re: Setup Client Certificate Authentication from S4HANA On Prem to CPI
entry.content:
More common would be to use the 'Certificate' option which will provide the certificate chain (signed by a trusted CA) and a corresponding private key.
That combo can be used to generate the PFX to import into STRUST (or PFX to PSE when PFX is not yet supported).

entry.title: Re: Eclipse (ADT) do not render SAP GUI properly
entry.content:
Thank you @matt for sharing your impression.❤

After your answer I don't believe that ADT team can help. And I don't believe SPA GUI team even exists. 😁 So, I'm just going to close the topic. 😉

entry.title: Re: Difference between S_ALR_87012093 and FBL1N
entry.content:
The documentation for S_ALR_87012093 says the following.

Vendor Business ( S_ALR_87012093)

Description

The vendor purchases list displays purchases in the local currency or in one of the output currencies that you specify

And the report does has 9 types of output Account sorting (all with their own list of fields to display, for a complete list of field please look at report information)

  1. Account sorting 1 -normal version 
  2. Account sorting 1 - corporate version
  3. Account sorting 2 -normal version 
  4. Account sorting 2 - corporate version
  5. Account sorting 3 -normal version 
  6. Account sorting 3 - corporate version
  7. Account sorting 4 -normal version 
  8. Account sorting 4 - corporate version
  9. Microfiche filming

and FBL1N (vendor Line Item display)

This program lists vendor line items (purchases, credit) . You can also display the items from more than one vendor account cross-company code in a list.

You can also change individual documents and carry out mass changes to posted line items from the list

 

So the difference is the line item display, does include more transactions and also gives you more functionality to

  • Branch to document display
  • When you are displaying posted documents, you can spring between posting items, without having to go back to the list.
  • Parked documents can be displayed individually.
  • Changing a document
  • Mass changes
  • For all the posted items selected, you can make another selection of document fields with new values. If it is not possible to make a change to a document, you can call up an error log for the item.
  • Displaying account master records
  • Displaying balances

entry.title: Re: How to work with exemptions using ABAP Test Cockpit (ATC) in the cloud during development in an

Nikhil Tiwari

entry.title: Re: iCCM analysis
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

As I understand, you are looking for information regarding iCCM (Intelligent Custom Code Management) service and it's prerequisites. 

iCCM is new code clustering tool running on SAP Business Technology Platform. The tool can help classifying code into categories Remediation, Retirement, and Rethink to develop a strategy towards making or keeping the SAP S/4HANA core clean.

The information you are seeking about the iCCM service and its prerequisites can be found in SAP Note: 3169647 - Custom Code Clustering Prerequisites. Please refer to this document for detailed information.

Additionally. you can refer to this blog: SAP MaxAttention Innovation Workshop 'Intelligent ... - SAP Community

 

Regards,
SAP Technical Support

entry.title: Re: Error BDEF "is not a lock entity" during generation o...
entry.content: Thank you for the link to the help pages. As far as i understood after reading the Concurrency Control chapter i need to add theese administrative fields, or at least a field that is used as ETag field as both locking mechanism (optimistic and pessimistic) are used in RAP. So without changing the original custom table i can't use a managed RAP implementation approach, right?

entry.title: Re: Task 1 - Create CDS View Entity ( August Developer Challenge )
entry.content:
CDS Data Preview

ABAP Class to copy data to new table

entry.title: Hi is there any t code to find approver approved leave requests.
entry.content: In MSS Employee sent a leave request for approval and approver approved it but after approver approved the request is disappeared, but user is asking i want a report like in a particular period how many  leave requests i approved. Is there any t code for this requirement.

entry.title: Re: Posting goods issue from Transportation management (TM) simplified in embedded TM in S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hello all,

There is an SAP note for the LOAD_END event:https://me.sap.com/notes/3139256/E

Please refer to it, if applicable for the support package of the SAP installation.

It did not help us.On debugging the method check_gm_relevance_for_dlv, found that the execution events were checked for the AVR item category, but the version installed , the LOAD_END event was not getting propagated to the item node and this was causing the no trigger for goods movement.

We are raising an OSS note request to SAP to see if SAP would provide a solution for this.

entry.title: Re: Adapt UI depending on user role
entry.content:
Hi Katharina,

You should check if you have the possibility in adaptation (user interface adaptation app) to define rules and add them in adaptation to a field or tab, to make it visible or not.

I do not have access to a Marketing Cloud tenant at this moment, but i can imagine a rule would look a bit like the ones we define in SAP Sales and Service cloud. When using business roles as a criteria, the rule might look as follows:

MYUSERROLES()=="BUSINESSROLEID"

Good luck

Kr.

MJ

entry.title: Re: What’s New in SAP Analytics Cloud Q3 2024
entry.content: Glad you find this blog helpful! @Mark_P_Burke  @DUMPA

entry.title: Re: Extending Fiori Elements, make a field read-only
entry.content:
I should add that when I do get a handle of the ExtensionAPI, it only has the following methods:

It doesn't seem to provide a way to attach an event or get handle on the model and events of the view.

entry.title: Re: Using BTP Authentication and Destinations with SAP Build Apps (formerly AppGyver) *and deploy it
entry.content:
Hi experts, 

I'm struggling with establishing the BTP destination in my SAP Build App. Destination to Success Factors configured in BTP cockpit and returns 200 replies on the "Check connection" button. 

HTML5.DynamicDestination = true, WebIDEEnabled = true (the AppgyverEnabled additional parameter isn't available for selection). 

In the SAP Build App, I get a 500 error that says the following: 

{
  "status": 500,
  "headers": {
    "content-length": "80",
    "content-type": "application/json; charset=utf-8",
    "date": "Tue, 13 Aug 2024 17:39:31 GMT",
    "etag": "W/\"50-sa5SlLWsYaGxfJDCkJJp6FVHVoQ\"",
    "strict-transport-security": "max-age=63072000; includeSubDomains; preload",
    "x-correlation-id": "54186dd4-79b3-454b-9524-a537e99d1abd",
    "x-frame-options": "DENY",
    "x-request-id": "54186dd4-79b3-454b-9524-a537e99d1abd"
  },
  "data": {
    "error": "Failed to build headers.",
    "message": "Unable to fulfill proxy request"
  }
}

It also says that only odata endpoint are supported so I added /odata/v2 to the destination URL in BTP cockpit:

https://api68sales.successfactors.com/odata/v2/

But I still facing the same error. Can someone help me here, please?

entry.title: Extensibility in Batch Management
entry.content:
What extensibility options do I have for batch management in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Extensibility in Batch Management
entry.content:
Hi,

For extensibility in batch management, please take a look at the following link from SAP Help:

  • Extensibility in Batch Management

To retrieve batch information, you can use the API API_BATCH_SRV, You can find an example in the following documentation:

  • Operations for Batch API - Retrieve Batch

If you want to determine batch characteristics, you can find the Released CDS views for Classification System in the following link from SAP Help:

  • CDS Views for Classification System

Thanks and regards.

entry.title: DI API to create fixed asset master data SAP B1 Fields not localized
entry.content:
Dear all,

I am developing an application to import fixed assets, replacing the function of SAP Business One Administration->Data Import/Export->Data Import->Import Fixed Asset Master Data from Microsoft Excel. However, I am not identifying the fields below in the object SAPbobsCOM.Items.
- Remaining Life, APC, Accumulated Ordinary Depr. and Asset Quantity. If anyone has a model with these fields, I would appreciate it.Best regards,

Eduardo Gama

entry.title: Re: BN4L Global Track & Trace - Testing GTT tracking requests with a Postman Mock Server

Hello Zenon,

may i know the  difference between this postman and write service postman ?

entry.title: Integration Options for moving data from SAP into Databricks
entry.content:
Background

This blog delves into the various methods for integrating data from your SAP systems into Databricks. This exploration is particularly relevant given SAP's recent announcement of SAP Datasphere in March 2023. This collaboration aims to provide businesses with the power of federated AI-driven analytics. This will allow them to effortlessly analyze structured and unstructured data from both SAP and non-SAP sources within a single, unified platform.

However, I am not going to discuss how we integrate SAP systems into Databricks via Datasphere or BW4 HANA as we already have great blogs on datasphere and BW4HANA.

This blog will explore options for migrating data from SAP to Databricks without relying on Datasphere or BW4HANA, even though licensing for transferring SAP data to non-SAP systems might still be necessary.

Integration Options

In this blog, I am discussing 4 different options to move data from SAP into data bricks.

SAP Data Services ETL Integration

We can leverage the popular ETL tool SAP Data Services to move data between SAP and Databricks.

While a direct integration between SAP Data Services and Databricks might not be readily available, you can establish a connection using intermediary stages and leveraging data transfer mechanisms. Here are a few approaches:

File-Based Integration:  Initiate the integration by designing and running data extraction jobs within SAP Data Services. These jobs should be configured to export your SAP data in formats readily consumable by Databricks, such as CSV, Parquet, or Avro. Once exported, these files can be seamlessly transferred to a storage service[Ex: Azure Blob Storage or AWS S3, as well as shared file systems] accessible by Databricks. 

Database Staging: Optimize your data pipeline by using SAP Data Services to efficiently load extracted and transformed data directly into a staging database readily accessible by Databricks. Suitable options for this staging database include Azure SQL Database, Amazon Redshift, or similar platforms. Once the data is in the staging area, establish a connection between Databricks and the database using  Spark JDBC connectors or Azure Synapse native connectors and map the respective tables.

Custom Integration using APIs: Investigate the availability of APIs or SDKs provided by both SAP Data Services and Databricks. Develop custom scripts or applications using languages like Python or Java to  extract data from SAP Data Services and transfer it to Databricks using their respective APIs.

SAP SLT Integration

Replicating SAP data to external systems using SAP SLT can be complex, but leveraging HANA as a staging area provides a pathway for efficient real-time replication. By establishing connectivity through JDBC Spark or SDI HANA connectors, you can move data into Databricks for AI based predictive analytics.

Event Based Messaging

Set up SAP BTP Integration Platform to capture real-time data changes from your SAP system, leveraging Change Data Capture (CDC) mechanisms or APIs for seamless data extraction. Then, integrate SAP BTP Integration Platform with a message queue or streaming platform like Apache Kafka or Azure Event Hubs to reliably publish these captured data changes. Databricks can then tap into these data streams using its robust streaming capabilities, subscribing to and consuming the data from the message queue.

This approach empowers you with near real-time data ingestion and analysis capabilities within Databricks. For additional flexibility, consider incorporating HANA Cloud as an optional staging area to further transform and prepare your data before it's loaded into Databricks.

SNP GLUE

SNP Glue is another product that can be used to replicate data from SAP platforms into cloud platforms. While that particular product might have limitations in terms of advanced transformation capabilities, it's essential to investigate its compatibility with other cloud solutions like SuccessFactors and Ariba to ensure a comprehensive integration strategy.

 

Key Considerations

We need consider the following factors when choosing the right tool :

Data Volume and Frequency: The chosen integration method should align with the volume of data being transferred and the desired frequency of updates.

Data Transformation: Determine whether data transformations are necessary before loading into Databricks and whether these transformations are best performed within SAP Data Services or using Databricks' data manipulation capabilities.

Security and Access Control:Implement appropriate security measures to protect data during transfer and storage, ensuring secure access to both SAP Data Services and Databricks.

Data Latency Requirements: Determine the acceptable latency for data availability in Databricks. The streaming approach offers near real-time capabilities, while the intermediate database approach might involve some delay

As you embark on your SAP-Databricks integration journey, carefully consider your specific needs, data characteristics, and latency requirements to select the optimal approach for your business. With a well-planned strategy and the right tools in place, you can harness the combined power of SAP and Databricks for AI powered federated analytics.

entry.title: Can we use different BP number range ? 1 for manually created BP in SAP and 1 for created vai API ?
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have a requirement to use differnent number range for BP creation bewteen 2 business units. I have created 2 (X1 and X2)  but we can use only 1 as internal number assignment.

X1 Assigned as Interganal Number assignement and this will pick as default.

X2 - I need to use this for BP created through API / Sales Force ?

How can we use the second number range if BP created through API from Sales force. Can we use different number ranges as per Business unit. Please advise.

entry.title: SAP GUI JRE Compatibility
entry.content:
HI Team 

We are using  SAP GUI for Windows on the end-user side. All our users are reaching to SAP systems (ECC,BW, BI,SCM,PM,HR,S4).
We have Win shuttle, Prometheus, Ariba and SAP PO, and Analysis for Office in our landscape 
We have JAVA 8 Update 301 However Oracle announced the engine will require a license in the future. hence infrastructure is planning to remove the licensed version of JAVA from our end user. Can we get a compatible version of JAVA requirements For SAP that SAP GUI 770 and SAP GUI 800?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SAP GUI JRE Compatibility
entry.content:
The SAP GUI for the Java Environment refers to SAP GUI for Java, which is an unified SAP front end running on Linux, OS X and Windows for connecting to WebAS ABAP. 

Recent versions of SAP GUI for Java come with the SAPmachine JRE embedded and therefore do not depend on an installed Java anymore other than for the installation. SAP therefore do not expect problems related to a migration to any other Java version. SAP GUI for Java's "About" dialog displays the Java VM that is used. It should display something like "Java VM: SAP SE Version 17.0.6+0-LTS". If so then the internal JRE is used.

For further information, check the SAP Note 146505 - SAP GUI for the Java environment (Platform Independent GUI)

Best Regards,

SAP Technical Support

entry.title: Re: Lock content while campaign status is "In Approval"/"...
entry.content:
Hi Sasha,

Thank you for your patience.

I discussed with the expert and unfortunately, there is currently no technical support available to prevent approval if assigned email content is In Revision.

However in 2408, we implemented a warning that is shown if an email assigned to a campaign is in Revision. But it will not prevent putting the campaign in approval and will not stop the approval process.

Putting an email into Revision is independent of the status of campaign. So it is possible that an email is set to In Revision even if the campaign using this email is already In Approval.

I understand that this would be desirable to have the linkage in the approval process between the email content and the campaign, however we will not invest in this functionality at this point.

This said, the approval is there for a dual control. The approver can always open the campaign with the link that is provided in the notification email or in the Marketing Approval app to navigate to the campaign and review the email content status. This can be part of the approval process in your side to reject the approval if the email is In Revision.

Best Regards, Isabelle

entry.title: Re: PM Data Migration from ECC to S4 Hana

entry.title: Re: PM Master Data ( Equipment ) Upload in S4 Hana

entry.title: Step Into Autonomy: Introduction to Configuration Manager
entry.content:
Ever thought about having the autonomy to manage your SAP Fieldglass company by yourself and reduce the number of support cases? As a Configuration Manager, this is already possible!

But, what is this Configuration Manager?

The configuration manager is a superuser that can perform many administrative actions independently, through a self-service dashboard.

 

Independence! This is what you get as a Configuration Manager. By reducing the need to open support cases with SAP Fieldglass, you increase productivity and save your precious time managing your time-sensitive tasks.

What exactly can a Configuration Manager control?

As a configuration manager, you are provided with access to integration, system, and maintenance tools, in the color-coded tiles of the self-service dashboard. You can, for example, set up connectors, enable and disable company configurations, and create and maintain API license keys. With all this empowerment, we recommend that this potent user role is created  for system administrators or technical resources at your company.

Check out all the features you can manage as a Configuration Manager:

Category

Available Features

Action

  • Allowed IP Addresses
  • Internal Reference
  • Qualification Dictionary
AnalyticsReport Schedule

Implementation Tools

  • Company Configuration
  • RCM Simulator

Integration Tools

  • API Application Keys
  • Connector Wizard
  • Encryption Keys and Certificates
  • End Points
  • Integration Subscriptions
  • Monitor Activity
  • SAP Task Center
Partner ManagementOpenText ECM

Publish/Subscribe Framework

  • App Activity Subscriptions
  • Payloads
  • Pub / Sub Wizard

Rates

  • Business Rules
  • Rate Component Groups
  • Rate Components
Single Sign-OnSingle Sign-On

You can also create the following items as a Configuration Manager:
• API Application Key
• App Activity Subscription
• Crypto Asset
• End Point
• Integration Subscription
• Payload
• Qualification
• Rate Component
• Rate Component Group

Watch this five-minute video to learn more about what is possible with Configuration Manager: Self Service Control to Streamline Integrations and Personalize Settings.

Why wait?

Interested in creating configuration managers for your company in SAP Fieldglass? See How to Create a Configuration Manager User for steps about creating your superuser and start easing your work with SAP Fieldglass right now!

Disclaimer: the image used is my original compilation based on an image with 'free to use and modify' license, according to Google search. The image of What do We Want meme is used here in accordance with fair use license for the purposes of parody.

entry.title: Re: Product Compliance / Who is the "Supplier"? (Goods Su...

Hello If I read your answer: in EKKO we have a field called LIFNR; I assume you referring to this field and the content of this field.

If this field is used: please extend the SAP docu. I would have assumed that only the "goods supplier" is checked.

Thanks for you answer

C.B.

entry.title: Why encrypt SAP HANA persistent data and log ?
entry.content:
Dear all,

This concerns sap hana on-premises

My company started recently to assess the possibility to use encryption for SAP Hana databases at the level of data / log and backups.
However, it is not clear what sort of attack the encryption tend to prevent :

2 distinct scenarios :
First: Database is not encrypted :

How can you read data directly from data files and logs of the Sap HANA system via unauthorized access to the OS and/or <sid>admin account? Unless you stop the database, copy it over to another place and open it for reading, I'm not seeing any other way to inspect data directly in the datafiles/logs at file system level. So why to encrypt ?

Second: Database is encrypted at the level of log and data
Supposing that the attack via unauthorized access to the OS and/or <sid>admin account is successful, then you will also have access to the SSFS store and master key saved in its default location :

/usr/sap/<SID>/SYS/global/hdb/security/ssfs/SSFS_<SID>.KEY
/usr/sap/<SID>/SYS/global/hdb/security/ssfs/SSFS_<SID>.DAT

So, what is the point to encrypt ? Or am I missing some additional security step to prevent this scenario ? 
Thank you for helping to clarify
Kind regards to all

entry.title: Re: No Business Place assigned to contract
entry.content: Go to RECN > Conditions > Term > Organizational Assignment > Enhancements > Assign Business Place here as i mentioned in my screenshots

entry.title: Re: What are the processing classes for a wage type that should only be SS & Medicare Taxable?
entry.content:
You can find detailed information about tax model here:
https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/erphcm/3354684289.html?locale=en-US

The main processing class is 71.

entry.title: Re: Nota Técnica 2023.001: tributação monofásica sobre combustíveis
entry.content:
Boa tarde pessoal! Tudo bem?

Após a aplicação das notas e customizações da BADI conseguimos trazer para tela o valor do ICMS 61 nos novos campos da J1B3N. Mas na linha do ICM7 de imposto o campo outra base esta sendo adicionado o valor calculado do ICMS adrem. Neste caso existe outra customização para excluir o valor do ICMS adrem da base ou não considera-lo ? 

no exemplo abaixo o valor da nota é de 25.400,00 e o valor do adrem 6.860,50 que somados estão totalizando a base de 32.260,50.

entry.title: Error in Scope Item J62 BB 3Y5(XX)
entry.content:
During the activation of the scope item, comes a popup providing additional information about GROUP CURRENCY confirmation. The manual confirmation button is clicked, a reason is provided and confirmation is finished.

This seems to "do nothing" as it just goes back to the previous screen prior to the confirmation. How to actually confirm the group currency manual step?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Error in Scope Item J62 BB 3Y5(XX)
entry.content:
The process can give the impression that nothing is happening but that is not the case. What happens is that whenever the group currency under a given scope item is manually confirmed, the focus automatically changes (and expands) to another one where the same confirmation is required.

If the previous one is once again selected and expanded, it will be found that it is indeed confirmed.

Mallikarjun

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere - Space, Data Integration, and Data Modeling Best Practices

entry.title: Re: PM Data Migration from ECC to S4 Hana
entry.content:
Hello @mohammedrahman4 ,

Editing is not possible by Migration cockpit but there are mass change transactions available in standard SAP. For example: in IE05 you can carry out mass change in equipment master. To activate mass change in equipment master you need to activiate a business functuion in SFW5. Business function names are LOG_EAM_CI_1 and LOG_EAM_SIMP. You also have to take authorization of auth object I_MASS. Then you can carry out mass change. 

Mass change is also available in IW28, IW38, IL05. Check in the top menu bar of these report outputs and you will get the option "Carry out mass change".

For activation of business functions contact th basis consultant of your project.

Vaibhav Mishra

entry.title: Simplified Transport Management
entry.content:
Are you a small medium size company? Are you a bit overwhelmed with the "flexibility" that the S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, 3-system landscape, brings you? Transport management is quite a different concept to adapt if you are new to the SAP world. For me, who "grow older" every day from my R/3 days, it was quite natural that now in Public Cloud there is this Dev, Test and Production landscape. And you will need to take care of transports, grouping of your configuration setting changes, moving them across, release, export, import, forward, import ... from one environment to another.

But we are in cloud now, you say, shouldn't these be a bit easier? Shouldn't it be automated to a certain extent? You are not alone. SAP hears you as well and you now have an option! 

You can now choose between Simple or Flexible transport mode for your business process configuration transports to suit your project needs. 

SAP, being SAP, LOL, the introduction of this nice little feature is kind of "hidden". This is a setting in the Extensibility Setting app under the Key User Extensibility tab for your Business Process Configuration settings. To use this new “ Simple Mode”, you do so by changing the Flexible Transport mode to “Off”. This is a landscape setting that carries across Dev, Test and Production. You need to have an Extensibility Specialist role assigned in order to see the app in your Development System in order to make a change.

When you choose the “Simple Mode”, you can create or have only One modifiable transport for all Business Process Configuration type (aka Customizing type) of transports in Export Customizing Transports app in the Development System Customizing Tenant. With this setting, once a week import is automated and enforced in your Test System. SAP delivered business content from update and upgrade (aka SAP Scheduled collections) is set to auto-forward to your Production System. 

Despite the awkwardness of selecting the option, it is indeed a nice feature to have in the public cloud ERP space. For example, a project doesn't have multiple country rollouts in scope, have limited business process activations, or with little extension considerations can simplify its overall transport process with Simple Transport Mode. 

You should evaluate and make a decision at the beginning of your Realize phase. You can always adjust that setting when you don’t have any open transports during the project. For example, if you are executing in multiple sprints during the realization phase, you clear your queue at the end of a sprint, and you can choose a new option at the beginning of your next. 

Even if you have a very complex project and have chosen to stick with the more manual, Flexible transport mode during your implementation in order to have better control, it certainly make sense to switch over to the Simple mode after go live if you only want to focus on the adaption of the newly implemented solution, and only push things to production if there is an update, upgrade from SAP or for some minor fixes, tweaking from the original settings you have made. 

Do remember to re-evaluate this if you are ready for improvement projects, especially when you plan on doing multiple country rollouts, having extension development with complex business process scope activations, Flexible transport mode may still be a better choice.

Check out SAP Activate roadmap for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition (3-system landscape) on Transport Management for end-to-end project activity details. 

Stay tuned for more updates and blogs.

Follow the SAP Activate page on the SAP Community. Remember to turn on your notification to receive updates or information about items requiring your attention. To enable notifications, follow the steps on the SAP Community Resources page.

SAP Activate Minute

Tune into the SAP Activate Minute videos in our Playlist here. Subscribe to get notified when we drop new videos. Here the one the Simple Transport Mode

entry.title: Re: Error during request to remote service: Failed to loa...
entry.content: When consuming external services with principal propagation you need to use a local approuter for testing. Can you maybe share it using git?

entry.title: Error AC770, derived area 3 in chart of depreciation x requires at least two base depreciation area
entry.content:
Hi,

I want to create new depreciation area , so I just enter OADB code and copy the existing one and create but while I trying to saving to generate transport request , it gives me error for other  depreciation area that 

"The derived area 31 in chart of depreciation XYZ requires at least two base depreciation areas."

until resolved  issue system don't allow me to create new depreciation area.

please provide suggestion

entry.title: BAS learning journey 'Unknown type undefined (com.sap.learning.Price) in ...'
entry.content:
Going through the CAP-Development learning journey, on the step of 'Using Databases', at the part where initializing data using the command 'cds add data' and this error occurs.

user: cap-development-learning-journey $ cds add data
Adding feature 'data'...
Unknown type undefined (com.sap.learning.Price) in 'com.sap.learning.Books:price'
Skipping db/data/com.sap.learning-Authors.csv
Skipping db/data/com.sap.learning-Books.csv

Successfully added features to your project.

The csv files are generated, but with no Price columns. Is that correct?

entry.title: Re: BAS learning journey 'Unknown type undefined (com.sap.learning.Price) in ...'
entry.content: This is the model file: namespace com.sap.learning; type Genre : Integer enum { fiction = 1; non_fiction = 2; } type NoOfBooks : Integer; type Price { amount : Decimal; currency : String(3); } entity Books { key ID : UUID; title : String(255); genre : Genre; publCountry : String(3); stock : NoOfBooks; price : Price; isHardcover : Boolean; } entity Authors { key ID : UUID; name : String(100); dateOfBirth : Date; dateOfDeath : Date; }

entry.title: Re: How to assign particular user to app variant
entry.content:
Hello,

You can create an app variant and assign this variant to a Business Catalog. Then, you can use this Catalog to create a specific Business Role that should be assigned to the specific users. 

You can check SAP Help Portal | Publishing App Variants. 

 

Kind regards.

entry.title: Re: BAS learning journey 'Unknown type undefined (com.sap.learning.Price) in ...'
entry.content: and the sql preview: CREATE TABLE com_sap_learning_Books ( ID NVARCHAR(36) NOT NULL, title NVARCHAR(255), genre INTEGER, publCountry NVARCHAR(3), stock INTEGER, price_amount DECIMAL, price_currency NVARCHAR(3), isHardcover BOOLEAN, PRIMARY KEY(ID) ); CREATE TABLE com_sap_learning_Authors ( ID NVARCHAR(36) NOT NULL, name NVARCHAR(100), dateOfBirth DATE_TEXT, dateOfDeath DATE_TEXT, PRIMARY KEY(ID) );

entry.title: Re: Mexico Einvoice CFDI V 4.0
entry.content: We got incorrect information from PAC counterparts. CFDI tag gets updates in the response structure. The Einvoice generated from SAP has n5 tag.

entry.title: Re: How to add a custom tile from the Service Binding the...
entry.content: Hello! It's necessary to have access to SAP BAS. You can have the developer user and the other end users will be able to access the app inside S4HC.

entry.title: Documentation on SD Master contract through Sales order release (ECC)
entry.content:
I'm trying to find some good documentation that allows me to create a master contract and then release contracts from that and then create Sales orders form that. How they are created and how they connect to each other and how they are used in MRP.

Im looking for an ECC application and not S/4.

entry.title: ID giới thiệu Binance là gì? C15HJGN1
entry.content:
Trao đổi tiền điện tử

Binance

ID giới thiệu

C15HJGN1

Phần thưởng chào mừng

600 USDT + 40% giảm giá

Giảm phí

%20

quà

600 USDT

Mã giới thiệu Binance của bạn được ghi là C15HJGN1. Khi đăng ký trên sàn giao dịch Binance bằng mã này, bạn cần viết C15HJGN1 vào trường "ID giới thiệu" hoặc "Mã giới thiệu". Mã này có giá trị trọn đời và giảm giá hoa hồng 20% ​​khi giao dịch trên Binance.

entry.title: Re: Tax indicator 0 is not defined for use with condition...
entry.content:
Hello. I also have similar issue. The reason behind this issue is before entering condiion record for tax you should assign tax imdicator to your tax type. How ever in public cloud we cannot do relevant customising because before assigning tax indicator we have to customize public version of ovk1 but this step is not allowed. After that we should assign tax indicator to tax then we can use tax indicator with tax type. For this reason I have opened a feature request but to be accepted we Ned ay least 10 votes.  Here is the link: https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/324204

You can check and if this would help please press vote  SAP to take this topic into account and relevant customizing to public cloud

 

Thanks
